statement: In every magma, Equation 2775 (`x = ((y * z) * (x * y)) * y`) implies Equation 3943 (`x * y = (x * (z * z)) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0287
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op (op y z) (op x y)) y)) :
    ∀ x y z : G, (op x y) = (op (op x (op z z)) y)
